title: 日本ダービーの後に・開かれた窓

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Embracing her own style of racing, Mejiro Bright
manages to hold her own during the formidable
Japanese Derby and emerges victorious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka observes this and vows to rid
herself of doubt so that she may capture the
scenery she couldn't see today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright, without hesitation, decides on the
Kikuka Sho as her next goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To the Mejiro family, who places great emphasis
on winning prestigious events like the Tenno Sho
and the Classic Triple Crown, the Kikuka Sho is
another race she cannot ignore.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her desires are aligned firmly with what the family
wants.
